meta.title: Navaro – professional AI-powered quotes
meta.description: Create professional quotes with AI in minutes. Export as PDF, send to your customer and track their decision in real time.

hero.badge: Modular SaaS platform for business automation
hero.subtext: Create professional quotes with AI in minutes. Export as PDF, send to your customer and track their decision in real time.

cards.title: AI content generation
cards.description: Navaro creates intro, summary, bullet points and business copy based on your brief.

cards.title: Professional PDFs
cards.description: Professional PDF quotes with your logo, pricing breakdown and VAT. Multiple templates to choose from.

cards.title: One-click sending
cards.description: Send the quote to your customer via email directly from the app. They open, approve or decline it.

cards.title: Real-time tracking
cards.description: Track your quote status in real time. Know when a customer opened, approved or requested changes.

modules.title: Modules your business actually needs
modules.subtitle: Navaro adapts to your business. You only pay for what you use.

items.name: OfferGen
items.description: Create and manage quotes with AI, PDF export, send to customer, track status.

items.name: InvoiceGen
items.description: Invoicing with automatic numbering, VAT calculation and PDF export.

items.name: More modules
items.description: The platform is modular — more automation tools are on the way.

pricing.title: We're looking for beta testers!
pricing.description: Get free access in exchange for your feedback.

contact.title: Start with quotes that look professional and are under control.
contact.description: Book a demo or open the app and see OfferGen in action.
